description: Persisted program body on disk. steps[] wire is identical for action and subprogram; variables[] shape depends on programKind.

steps.notes: Same wire for action and subprogram.

stepRunnerKey.notes: From qkrpc step-runner get — do not guess.

ifSteps.when: branching step only (sys:if, sys:simpleIf, sys:loop, sys:group, …)
ifSteps.notes: Omit when empty. Do NOT write on normal action steps.

elseSteps.notes: Omit when empty. Never on leaf steps such as sys:getClipboardText.

stepId.notes: Editor-only handle (QuickerAgent UI). Workspace disk edit: omit — agents use read_data/write_data/edit_data on full steps[]; patch is save-only, not incremental op JSON. Runtime ignores stepId.

inputParams.valueType: Record<string, string | number | boolean | array | object>
inputParams.notes: One bind per catalog paramKey. Match valueType: List→JSON array, Dict→object, Boolean/Number→bool/number or string, Text→string ($$/$=). paramKey.var / paramKey.file: string only.

wireKeys.value: string | number | boolean | array | object — expressions ($$, $=) must be string

outputParams.notes: Value = target variable key or dictVar.entry. Declare variables[] first.

key.notes: Stable id; {key} and paramKey.var reference this.

default.notes: Inline default. Mutually exclusive with default.file.

default.file.notes: files/… path for long or external default.

id.notes: Export/editor id — not the variable name.

action.notes: Action data.json. Do NOT set isInput/isOutput/paramName — runtime input is {quicker_in_param} (expressions).

paramName.notes: IO param label; omit to use key.

inputParamInfo.notes: Input UI/validation when variable is subprogram input.
Input UI / binding hints when the variable is a subprogram input (isInput=true). All keys camelCase on wire; omit defaults (0 / false / "").

inputMethod.notes: Quicker InputMethod enum int: 0 none, 1 TextBox (default), 2 TextEditor, 3 DropDown, 4 Slider, 5 DatePicker, 6 CheckBox, 7 NumberBox, 8 CheckComboBox, 9 ColorPicker, 10 PasswordBox, 11 EditableDropDown, 13 EditableAutoCompleteDropDown, 14 DictEditor.

selectionItems.notes: Multi-line option list. Rows: value|label or value|label|hint. Non-empty → caller step shows a select; with onlyUseSelect=true the value is locked to listed options.

onlyUseSelect.notes: With selectionItems: restrict caller to listed options (no free text, no variable bind).

validationPattern.notes: Regex the input value must match.

variableMode.notes: ParamVariableMode enum int: 0 UseVarOrInput (default), 1 Input only, 2 UseVar, 3 UseVarOnly. Rarely set; sys:subprogram caller params always use 0 (or 1 when onlyUseSelect).

textTools.notes: Comma-separated TextToolType names shown as input helpers.

replaceMode.notes: TextToolsReplaceMode enum int: 0 ReplaceSelected (default), 1 ReplaceAll, 2 Append, 3 AppendWithSemicolon, 4 AppendWithNewline, 5 AppendWithComma.

isAdvanced.notes: Advanced param: collapsed into the advanced group in the caller step editor.

allowInput.notes: With selectionItems: also allow free-text input besides listed options.

multiLine.notes: Caller edits the value in a multi-line editor.

visibleExpression.notes: Param visible in caller step editor only when this expression over sibling params is truthy, e.g. {mode}==1.

skipEval.notes: Advanced: pass the caller-supplied value verbatim — skip {var} interpolation and $$ / $= expression parsing at call time. Text varType only. Use for regex/template/code payloads that contain literal braces or $ prefixes.

outputParamInfo.notes: Output UI hints when the variable is a subprogram output (isOutput=true).

visibleExpression.notes: Output param visible in caller step editor only when this expression is truthy.

tableField.notes: Table column schema when varType=table. Additional Quicker FormField fields may appear on disk.
